description_long: This object is a black handheld game controller, closely resembling the iconic design of the Sony PlayStation DualShock series. The front face features a classic arrangement of buttons: a directional pad on the left, four action buttons with colored symbols (triangle, circle, cross, square) on the right, and two analog sticks symmetrically placed near the bottom center. Two small buttons are positioned between the analog sticks, likely representing 'Start' and 'Select'. The top edge houses two pairs of shoulder buttons, slightly raised and angled for ergonomic finger placement. The back and sides are contoured for comfortable grip, with a smooth, matte plastic finish and no visible branding or display screen.
description: A black, ergonomic handheld game controller with dual analog sticks, a D-pad, and four colored action buttons, resembling a PlayStation controller.
description_view_0: Front view showing the D-pad, four colored action buttons, two analog sticks, and central buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the contoured grip and the profile of the shoulder buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back, ergonomic handles, and the tops of the shoulder buttons.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the grip contour and the side profile of the buttons and analog sticks.
